destinations.evidence: Txpool RPC details use SCHEDULED_TX_TYPE_ID for scheduled originals.
Alloy defines the scheduled transaction type constant as 0x10.

equivalence_argument: Mapped in port and alloy: txpool uses the shared scheduled type constant.
rationale: The current txpool RPC code imports SCHEDULED_TX_TYPE_ID and uses it for OriginalTransaction::Scheduled.
statement: The txpool RPC representation for scheduled original transactions must report SCHEDULED_TX_TYPE_ID rather than a stale literal transaction type value.
suggested_falsification_tests: Call txpool async/scheduled detail conversion for a scheduled original and assert tx_type equals SCHEDULED_TX_TYPE_ID.
summary: Scheduled txpool RPC reports the shared scheduled type constant.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Txpool RPC scheduled detail unit test for tx_type constant.
title: Scheduled txpool RPC reports the scheduled type constant
